title: helianthus annuus var. texanus
intro: Helianthus annuus var. texanus, commonly known as the Texas sunflower, is a variety of the annual sunflower plant that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helianthus annuus var. texanus include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
